name: her-strike
prompt: Close-up, dramatic composition. Brunette woman's face, aimed precision in her expression. Dark radiating lines behind — impact moment, the sharpest weapon deployed. Eyes locked on him, knowing exactly where the wound will open. | anime manga, cel shading, dramatic lighting, high detail

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: If you loved me enough, you'd come with me.
